channel.title: Health & Longevity Brief
channel.description: AI-synthesized intelligence brief on health, longevity, and life extension research.
channel.itunes:author: Knowledge Studio
channel.itunes:summary: AI-synthesized intelligence brief on health, longevity, and life extension research.

item.title: Health & Longevity Daily Brief — February 27, 2026
item.description:
# HEALTH & LONGEVITY PODCAST — February 27, 2026
Hey, thanks for tuning in. We've got a really solid day of aging research to walk through—and honestly, some of this is pushing the conversation in directions I think we need to be paying closer attention to.
Let's start with what I think is the mos...

item.title: Health & Longevity Daily Brief — February 24, 2026
item.description:
# HEALTH & LONGEVITY — February 24, 2026
Hey, welcome. Today we're looking at some really important developments in how we understand extreme aging and the biological mechanisms that might let us intervene earlier than we've ever been able to. There's some genuine signal here—both in terms of what ...

item.title: Health & Longevity Daily Brief — February 20, 2026
item.description:

Hey there. Welcome back. Today we're looking at some genuinely fascinating developments in how we understand aging at the cellular level—and what that might mean for actual interventions that could slow or even reverse some of the hallmarks of gettin...

item.title: Health & Longevity Daily Brief — February 9, 2026
item.description:
# HEALTH & LONGEVITY PODCAST — February 7, 2026
---
So here's what jumped out to me this week: we might need to completely rethink how we talk about living longer. And it's not because we've discovered some new miracle drug or biohack. It's actually the opposite. It's because the old way of thinki...
